item.title: Why is Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹1,237.85 with a gain of ₹41.05 or 3.43%. This upward movement reflects the company’s robust financial results and sustained positive market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Dolfin Rubbers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Dolfin Rubbers Ltd witnessed a notable uptick in its share price, closing at ₹183.00 with a gain of ₹1.75 or 0.97%. This rise reflects the stock’s continued outperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices, supported by recent positive momentum and technical indicators. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Ameya Precision Engineers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Ameya Precision Engineers Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 4.91% to ₹112.25 by 09:13 PM. This upward movement reflects the company’s robust performance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Jindal Capital Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Jindal Capital Ltd experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.72% to close at ₹37.50. This drop comes amid a brief two-day losing streak, despite the stock’s impressive performance over longer time horizons compared to the broader market. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Benares Hotels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Benares Hotels Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹10,010.00 with a gain of ₹364.9 or 3.78%. This upward movement reflects a combination of robust long-term growth metrics, favourable trading patterns, and increased investor participation, positioning the stock well above key technical benchmarks. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Solar Industries India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Apr, Solar Industries India Ltd has witnessed a notable rise in its stock price, closing at ₹14,520.00 with a gain of ₹441.75 or 3.14%. This upward movement reflects the company’s robust financial performance and sustained market outperformance relative to benchmarks and sector peers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.44% to close at ₹1,337.00. This drop comes despite the company’s robust long-term performance and solid financial metrics, reflecting short-term market pressures and reduced investor participation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Steelcast Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Apr, Steelcast Ltd’s stock price rose sharply by 4.44% to ₹294.30, reaching a new 52-week high of ₹295. This rally reflects a combination of robust financial performance, sustained investor interest, and strong market momentum that has propelled the stock well above benchmark indices. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Infosys Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Apr, Infosys Ltd’s stock price has declined by 1.16% to ₹1,277.35, continuing a downward trend over recent days despite the company’s strong fundamentals and sector standing. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: TVS Srichakra Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Upswing
item.description: TVS Srichakra, a small-cap player in the Tyres & Rubber Products sector, has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 13 April 2026, reflecting its impressive recent financial performance and technical momentum. This inclusion highlights the company’s robust earnings growth and operational efficiency, positioning it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking momentum-driven opportunities in the current market cycle. Time: Apr 13 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Mawana Sugars Added to Hidden Turnarounds List on Strong Financial Recovery
item.description: Mawana Sugars has been newly added to the Hidden Turnarounds list as of 13 April 2026, reflecting a significant shift in its financial trajectory and market sentiment. The micro-cap sugar company’s recent quarterly results and improved financial metrics have positioned it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking early-stage turnaround opportunities within the sugar sector. Time: Apr 13 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Ind Bank Housing Q4 FY26: Micro-Cap Housing Financier Struggles with Persistent Losses
item.description: Ind Bank Housing Ltd., the micro-cap housing finance company promoted jointly by Indian Bank and HUDCO, reported another quarter of losses in Q4 FY26, posting a net loss of ₹0.02 crores for the quarter ended March 2026. The company, with a market capitalisation of just ₹46.00 crores, continues to grapple with operational challenges despite a recent surge in stock price, which jumped 5.25% to ₹46.50 following the results announcement. Time: Apr 13 2026 08:01 PM IST
